package rulecoverage

func NegativeContextBackgroundUsed() string {
    ruleID := "context_background_used"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Functions or request handlers that already have a caller-owned context available but still create context.Background() or context.TODO() locally."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
